name: upy-select-hw-plugin
description: Workflow plugin phase for MicroPython board selection, firmware validation, pin assignment, and BOM generation.

interface.shortDescription: Selects a MicroPython board, pins, firmware, and BOM.
interface.longDescription: Consumes upy-analyze-plugin phase_complete manifest_content and emits a validated select-hw phase_complete payload for the downstream MicroPython firmware flashing phase.
defaultPrompt: Run select-hw from an analyze phase_complete.
